title: Illustrate Ai: A Journey Through AI's Interpretation of Light
description:
Dive into the mesmerizing world of lighting with our cat portrait experiment! Using 'Illustrate Ai' from designbundles, we explore everything from natural dawn hues to futuristic cyberpunk glows. Discover the nuances of indoor shades, specialized studio setups, and playful artificial illuminations. Witness how light transforms mood and visuals in this captivating journey! 

Prompts also work with stable diffusion sdxl 1.0

📸✨🐱 #LightingMagic #DesignBundles #IllustrateAI #pixaroma 

Join our community: https://www.facebook.com/groups/pixaromacommunity

DB Illustrate Ai Library: 
https://designbundles.net/illustrate-ai/library

00:00 Introduction
00:43 Natural Light
01:56 Studio Light
03:18 Artificial Light
05:11 Prompt Examples
transcript: Hello designers, crafters and AI enthusiasts. Welcome back to another episode on Illustrate AI.  Are you a design bundle's plus unlimited subscriber? Portrait photo of a cat, and then we'll dive  into the world of light, artificial versus natural, to see how tweaking the prompt can transform our  image.
